synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20921 Oracle Linux 9 containers-common bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20921
description:
[4:1-135.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-135]
- Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include complete list of UBI/RHEL images
- Resolves: RHEL-116618
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20921

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20921.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
containers-common-1-135.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
containers-common-extra-1-135.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
containers-common-1-135.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
containers-common-extra-1-135.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/containers-common-1-135.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4:1-135.0.1]
- Disable zstd:chunked partial pull support
- Updated removed references [Orabug: 33473101] (Alex Burmashev)
- Adjust registries.conf (Nikita Gerasimov)
- remove references to RedHat registry (Nikita Gerasimov)

[4:1-135]
- Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include complete list of UBI/RHEL images
- Resolves: RHEL-116618
